check.command: az sql db tde show --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --database $DB --query 'status' -o tsv

checks.description: Transparent Data Encryption (TDE) must be enabled on the Azure SQL database

check.command: az sql server audit-policy show --resource-group $RG --name $SERVER --query 'state' -o tsv

checks.description: Auditing must be enabled on the Azure SQL server
Azure SQL Database must enforce TLS 1.2 as minimum version

check.command: az sql server ad-admin list --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --query '[].login' -o tsv

checks.description: Azure Active Directory admin must be configured for the SQL server

check.command: az sql server firewall-rule list --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --query "[?startIpAddress=='0.0.0.0' && endIpAddress=='255.255.255.255']" -o tsv

checks.description: Azure SQL firewall must not allow unrestricted access (0.0.0.0 to 255.255.255.255)
Public network access must be disabled on the Azure SQL server

check.command: az sql db threat-policy show --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --name $DB --query 'state' -o tsv

checks.description: Advanced Threat Protection must be enabled on the Azure SQL database

check.command: az sql server audit-policy show --resource-group $RG --name $SERVER --query 'retentionDays' -o tsv

checks.description: Audit log retention must be configured for at least 90 days
Azure SQL Database must be configured for zone redundancy
Backup storage redundancy must be set to geo-redundant

check.command: az sql server vnet-rule list --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --query 'length(@)' -o tsv

checks.description: Virtual network service endpoints must be configured for Azure SQL

check.command: az sql db classification list --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --name $DB --query 'length(@)' -o tsv

checks.description: Data classification must be configured on the Azure SQL database

check.command: az sql db tde show --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --database $DB --query 'serverKeyType' -o tsv

checks.description: TDE must use a customer-managed key stored in Azure Key Vault

check.command: az sql server firewall-rule list --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --query "[?name=='AllowAllWindowsAzureIps']" -o tsv

checks.description: Allow Azure services firewall rule must not be enabled unless required

check.command: az sql db audit-policy show --resource-group $RG --server $SERVER --name $DB --query 'state' -o tsv

checks.description: Database-level auditing must be enabled on the Azure SQL database
